prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-103 Overcurrent device selection & coordination within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. The observed field condition is: breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch. The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C) termination temp ratings. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T2 E-103 Document interpretation
